title: Mountain landscape and reference chains
description: The reference mountain chain of this VC is Slovak Carpathians. The reference mountain landscape of this VC is Hozelec. Hozelec is a small municipality located between two small villages Gánovce and Švábovce. There is a direct view on the High Tatras (the highest mountains in Slovakia). The district city Poprad is located 5km away.

title: Interest on this VC
description: Specialized small-scale farming producing high-quality products. It is an adaptation of small farmers to the market by particular products. They cannot compete on the market with prominent producers and/or with productions located in better natural conditions for agriculture. One farm produces cold-pressed oils from Silybum marianum, Rapeseed oil, Hemp oil, Flax, and Poppy seeds. Another farm produces EU-certified organic hemp (in Východná, 775 m above sea), including manual harvesting and processing tincture. The farms have an e-shop, and products are sold in Slovakia. Production of new products in Slovak mountains is rare.
